title: Missing swagger type for SpecGenerator expose attribute
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

The Swagger type for SpecGenerator.expose does not have a type.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Lookup definition at https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#operation/libpodCreateContainer

**Describe the results you received:**

The expose attribute type is Any.

**Describe the results you expected:**

The correct attribute type, e.g. `map of uint16 (port number) to a string`.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@TristanCacqueray could you open a PR to fix?
It seems like the issue is related to the `uint16` basic type for the key, but i can't find where or how to fix that.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
